MORS ID Description
TXT-BOOK-PDF-000001-01-AE3F2D First book, PDF format
VID-MOVIE-MP4-003476-02-B12C7A 3,476th movie, MP4, second version
IMG-PHOTO-JPG-100984-01-8F4D9C 100,984th photo in JPG format
SFT-APP-EXE-001502-03-C17B8E 1,502nd software application, EXE format, version 3

9. Search & Querying

A digital database could use:
• Text search (by category, format, ID)
• Hash lookup (to verify integrity)
• Version tracking (to fetch the latest update)
• Decentralized distribution (via blockchain or IPFS)

10. Implementation in Digital Libraries, Operating Systems, and Media Platforms
• Digital Libraries: Academic papers, archives, and repositories could use MORS to standardize referencing.
• Operating Systems: File systems could apply this naming convention for tracking and indexing files.
• Media Platforms: Streaming services, app stores, and file-sharing platforms could integrate MORS to unify and manage diverse content types.
